free_text: Asymmetry in angular distributions of photoneutrons
Angular and energy distributions of photoneutrons
from Rh-103, Ta-181, Au-197, Bi-209 are measured at
energy E=28.5 MeV. The measured energy spectra are
compared with the energy spectra of neutrons produced
in identical conditions at the end-point energy
Data were compiled in SCJAD of Saratov
SD: Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrected according last EXFOR rules and Dict.
